kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper - module kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper
 

L

loadSettings(StringPath) - Method in class com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperSettingsStore
Reads the settings object at the given path from Zookeeper Indexes the object Propagates changes to any dependent registry Calls onSettingsUpdated(StringPath, SettingsObject) Adds a watcher for the given path

O

on(StringPath) - Method in interface com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperConnection.ListenerMethod
Called with the path when a Zookeeper notification is processed
onConnected() - Method in interface com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperConnectionListener
 
onConnection(Runnable) - Method in class com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperConnection
Sets code to call when Zookeeper connects
onDisconnected() - Method in interface com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperConnectionListener
 
onNodeChildrenChanged(StringPath) - Method in interface com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperChangeListener
Called when the children of a Zookeeper node have changed
onNodeChildrenChanged(StringPath) - Method in class com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperSettingsStore
Reload the settings store if children changed
onNodeCreated(StringPath) - Method in interface com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperChangeListener
Called when a Zookeeper node is created
onNodeCreated(StringPath) - Method in class com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperSettingsStore
 
onNodeDataChanged(StringPath) - Method in interface com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperChangeListener
Called when the data for a Zookeeper node has changed
onNodeDataChanged(StringPath) - Method in class com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperSettingsStore
Called when a node is created or its data changes.
onNodeDeleted(StringPath) - Method in interface com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperChangeListener
Called when a Zookeeper node is deleted
onNodeDeleted(StringPath) - Method in class com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperSettingsStore
Called when a Zookeeper node is deleted

W

watch(StringPath) - Method in class com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperConnection
Watches the given path for changes, which will be given to the ZookeeperChangeListener.
watchers() - Method in class com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperConnection
 
watchRoot() - Method in class com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperConnection
Starts watching the Zookeeper root
write(StringPath, byte[]) - Method in class com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperConnection
Writes the given data to the node at the given path

Z

zookeeper() - Method in class com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperConnection
 
ZookeeperChangeListener - Interface in com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper
Methods that are called when Zookeeper data is created, changes or is deleted.
ZookeeperConnection - Class in com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper
Maintains a connection to zookeeper and performs operations using that connection
ZookeeperConnection(ZookeeperConnectionListener, ZookeeperChangeListener) - Constructor for class com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperConnection
 
ZookeeperConnection.ListenerMethod - Interface in com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper
Functional interface to ZookeeperChangeListener methods
ZookeeperConnection.Settings - Class in com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper
Settings for this Zookeeper connection
ZookeeperConnection.State - Enum in com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper
State of this settings store
ZookeeperConnectionListener - Interface in com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper
Methods that are called when Zookeeper data is created, changes or is deleted.
ZookeeperSettingsStore - Class in com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper
A SettingsStore that uses Apache Zookeeper to load and save settings objects, so they can be easily accessed in a clustered environment.
ZookeeperSettingsStore(ObjectSerializer) - Constructor for class com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperSettingsStore
Creates a settings store that uses the default CreateMode from ZookeeperConnection.Settings
ZookeeperSettingsStore(CreateMode, ObjectSerializer) - Constructor for class com.telenav.kivakit.settings.stores.zookeeper.ZookeeperSettingsStore
Creates a settings store with the given explicit CreateMode.
